page: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. It is powered by an Intel processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 192 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes a substantial local storage capacity of 11339 GB and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. There are no graphics processing units (GPUs) bundled with this instance, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for large-scale enterprise deployments that require significant compute power paired with extensive local disk space without the overhead of specialized GPU hardware.

Given its high vCPU count, balanced memory-to-core ratio, and massive local storage capacity, the D192ds_v7 is suited for demanding enterprise workloads. Appropriate use cases include large relational databases, extensive data warehousing, high-throughput web serving, and complex general-purpose enterprise applications that benefit from local scratch space and high-density compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v7 is a high-capacity, general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, this instance provides 192 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It features a massive local storage capacity of 11339 GB and is premium storage capable, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The server offers a high-density hardware profile, delivering qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale deployments that require substantial compute resources and local disk space without GPU acceleration. The D192ds_v7 is highly suited for enterprise workloads, including large-scale databases, data warehousing, high-throughput web serving, and general-purpose applications requiring extensive local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and 11339 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale enterprise workloads and databases.

tagline: A high-density general-purpose virtual machine featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated cores and massive local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.
